name: summary-mode-emits-nothing
description: Summary is a setting value only; there is no CapturedToolPayload union member.

name: omitted-mode-envelope-without-hash
description: Omitted mode preserves source byte length but no brute-forceable hash commitment.

name: full-redacted-tool-input
description: Full mode stores a redacted JSON object with separate source and stored hashes.

name: full-truncated-preview-with-marker
description: Oversized full payloads retain source commitment and store a UTF-8 preview with marker.

input.content: prefix 😀 suffix with additional output that exceeds the producer preview budget

name: capture-failed-with-source-commitment
description: Failure after storage was policy-approved can carry source commitment metadata without content.

name: serialization-error
description: Producer-side serialization failures are content-free failure envelopes.

input.description: fixture placeholder; real producer input was not serializable

name: size-precheck-exceeded
description: Payloads above the hard input cap fail before source hashing.

name: invalid-payload
description: Producer-side invalid decoded payloads are explicit failures.

input.description: fixture placeholder for invalid decoded hook payload

name: server-validation-error
description: Server-side schema validation failures degrade per field, not per batch.

input.description: fixture placeholder for malformed captured field at ingest

name: server-redaction-error
description: Server-side re-redaction failures degrade to a content-free envelope.

input.description: fixture placeholder for ingest redaction failure
